narrative:
Johnstown City has 3,928 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.7 percentage points.
